title: ouratea finlayi
intro: Ouratea finlayi, also known as the Ouratea tree, is a plant species native to Australia and New Caledonia, belonging to the family Ochnaceae. The medicinal properties of Ouratea finlayi include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Ouratea finlayi can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
